category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Saint Lucia.

title.en: China-to-Saint Lucia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入圣卢西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入聖露西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Saint Lucia SLBS / NURC / LUCELEC requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, grid-connection and project-approval requirements, OCPP interoperability, coastal hurricane and salt-mist derating, Port Castries logistics, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与圣卢西亚SLBS / NURC / LUCELEC要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、并网及项目审批要求、OCPP互操作、沿海飓风和盐雾降额、卡斯特里港物流，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與聖露西亞SLBS / NURC / LUCELEC要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、併網及項目審批要求、OCPP互操作、沿海颶風和鹽霧降額、卡斯特里港物流，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Saint Lucia, treat the opportunity as an early-stage OECS / CARICOM tourism-island deployment rather than a mature EV market. Saint Lucia uses a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid, while China uses 220 V / 380 V at the same 50 Hz, so voltage differs and input range must be confirmed. The practical gaps are: IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence instead of GB/T 18487 alone; connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC; IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence; LUCELEC grid-connection review under NURC-regulated electricity service; SLBS standards and conformity documentation; tropical coastal protection against hurricane wind, rain ingress, salt mist, corrosion, heat, and shipping via Port Castries; and OCPP back-office support for any networked charger. Saint Lucia's EV fleet and charging market remain essentially non-existent, so exporters should frame proposals as pilots for hotels, fleets, public sites, or renewable-energy projects rather than assume broad retail demand.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入圣卢西亚时，应将其视为早期OECS / CARICOM旅游岛国部署机会，而非成熟电动汽车市场。圣卢西亚电网为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；中国为220 V / 380 V、同为50 Hz，因此电压不同，须确认输入范围。实务差距包括：须提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据，而非仅依赖GB/T 18487；接口须从GB/T 20234改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；提供IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量证据；在NURC监管的电力服务框架下通过LUCELEC并网审查；满足SLBS标准和合格文件要求；针对飓风、雨水侵入、盐雾、腐蚀、高温和经卡斯特里港海运的热带沿海环境进行防护；联网充电桩还须支持OCPP后台。圣卢西亚电动汽车保有量和充电市场基本尚未形成，出口商应将方案定位为酒店、车队、公共场所或可再生能源项目试点，而非假定存在广泛零售需求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入聖露西亞時，應將其視為早期OECS / CARICOM旅遊島國部署機會，而非成熟電動汽車市場。聖露西亞電網為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；中國為220 V / 380 V、同為50 Hz，因此電壓不同，須確認輸入範圍。實務差距包括：須提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據，而非僅依賴GB/T 18487；接口須從GB/T 20234改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；提供IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量證據；在NURC監管的電力服務框架下通過LUCELEC併網審查；滿足SLBS標準和合格文件要求；針對颶風、雨水侵入、鹽霧、腐蝕、高溫和經卡斯特里港海運的熱帶沿海環境進行防護；聯網充電樁還須支持OCPP後台。聖露西亞電動汽車保有量和充電市場基本尚未形成，出口商應將方案定位為酒店、車隊、公共場所或可再生能源項目試點，而非假定存在廣泛零售需求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLBS scope determination, NURC approval, LUCELEC connection consent, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Saint Lucia conformity assessment rules, LUCELEC connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLBS适用范围裁定、NURC批准、LUCELEC接入许可、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行圣卢西亚合格评定规则、LUCELEC接入要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLBS適用範圍裁定、NURC批准、LUCELEC接入許可、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行聖露西亞合格評定規則、LUCELEC接入要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
